title: Mutual Halt Collapse — Day 2 Halt Breaks Down
snippet: The 'fragile tactical pause' reported on June 10 has completely collapsed. Tit-for-tat strikes between the US and Iran have replaced the mutual halt. The escalation cycle follows the pattern: Apache helicopter downing triggers US strikes, which trigger Iran retaliation. The mutual halt lasted less than 48 hours before breaking down entirely.
tag_reason: 6/10 '취약한 전술적 일시 중단'(src-1678) 후속 — 48시간 내 완전 붕괴 확인
